crypto._notes: Per-position cap for crypto signals (3.4.1). Wider spreads + 24/7 markets mean we size more conservatively than equity. Auto_trader detects crypto symbols via monitoring.crypto_adapter.is_crypto_symbol and uses this cap instead of auto_trade.max_position_usd. Set 0 to fall back to the default (500).

auto_trade._notes: enabled=false → process_signals is never called. enabled=true + dry_run=true → logs would-be orders without submitting. enabled=true + dry_run=false → REAL Alpaca paper orders. Eligibility = (closed_outcomes >= min_outcomes) AND (mean_ret_pct >= min_mean_ret_pct) AND (sharpe_ish >= min_sharpe_ish). Cool-down: when a strategy's last cool_down_losers closed outcomes were ALL losers, pause new entries for cool_down_days trading days. Set cool_down_losers=0 to disable. Earnings veto: skip entries on a symbol within earnings_veto_days trading days of its next earnings event (populated by monitoring.earnings_calendar). Set to 0 to disable. Negative-sentiment veto: when veto_negative_sentiment=true, skip entries on symbols with >= negative_sentiment_threshold negative-sentiment news items in the last negative_sentiment_window_hours hours (requires news.sentiment populated by news_fetcher). Live-strategies routing: each strategy_id listed in live_strategies submits to a separate `alpaca_live` credentials section (paper=false). Empty list (default) keeps every strategy on paper. Adding a strategy here requires an alpaca_live section in credentials.json — without it, those signals SKIP_LIVE_CREDS_MISSING and never submit.

notes: These are non-secret settings. Edit freely.
